codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 98c0f41119ccbe019a6856d644f3d5b5c2032b94 against the feature contract and validation targets. The implementation cleanly distinguishes informational metadata-only retrieval, hard-unsupported retrieval, standalone Unpaywall metadata-only limits, and IEEE/ACM gated skeleton retrieval; the affected source capability descriptors in the registry match the connector behavior, and the CLI now returns unsupported-capability exit code 3 for informational retrieval states without introducing stray-file side effects.

summary: Pass: transcript skeleton, handoff, and diff review found the retrieval-contract implementation consistent with the requested behavior for info-only, unsupported, Unpaywall-limited, and gated IEEE/ACM retrieval flows, with no high-confidence actionable bugs identified.
